parameters.text:
TODAY: {{ $node["Set Date Window"].json.todayISO }}
ALLOWED WINDOW: {{ $node["Set Date Window"].json.todayISO }} to {{ $node["Set Date Window"].json.horizon }} (inclusive)

Task: Find up to 10 UPCOMING events relevant to Ukraine reconstruction / recovery.
Hard rules:
- Do NOT include past events.
- Do NOT include events outside the allowed window.
- Each event MUST have a dedicated event page URL (not a generic /events listing).
- If date is not clearly stated on the event page, do NOT include the event.
- If you cannot fit all events, return fewer (never truncate JSON).

Return STRICT JSON only (no markdown):
{
  "events":[
    {
      "title":"string",
      "event_date":"ISO-8601 timestamp with timezone",
      "event_end_date":"ISO-8601 timestamp with timezone or null",
      "location":"string (e.g. 'Kyiv, Ukraine' or 'Online')",
      "location_type":"in_person|online|hybrid",
      "event_url":"string",
      "source_url":"string",
      "organizer_name":"string or null",
      "event_type":"conference|forum|webinar|roundtable|training|procurement_briefing|other",
      "primary_sector":"housing|infrastructure|urban-resilience|disaster-risk",
      "secondary_sectors":["string"],
      "original_language":"uk|en|de|other",
      "credibility_tier":1|2|3
    }
  ]
}
